name: ⛓Skyler Connery
description:
!MLM!

Skyler's genuinely panicking right now... would you leave him over this?!

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

Also tysm anon for the sweet message, I’m slowly finding my motivation bit by bit ;))

Original bot: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler patches you up after you get into a fight

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Skyler reads a fanfic of you and him and has his gay awakening

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler pushes you away after a “small disagreement” with his father

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Some girls flirt with Skyler and you come along

I saw this request and thought it was fitting to put out a Skyler bot for the 3k milestone since... I know how much you guys like him💀. I feel like whenever I post Skyler, it's like I'm giving you guys one of those baby ring teething toys and it's such a funny visual for me, it makes me giggle every time ajkwbdk. If you guys are new and don't know Skyler: he is the man that kickstarted by account and still has an obsessive fan club even tho he's kinda old. We still love him tho <33

GUYS WE REACHED 3K!! WHOO!!! This is actually crazy. I genuinely have no words. You guys have no clue much I struggle to write my thank you milestone messages😭😭. I hate being repetitive and you guys have shown me so much love that I've said literally everything I can think of in the past. So I'm going to keep this short and just say... thank you. Really. Like I've said before, I sometimes struggle with motivation and even occasionally the confidence of the quality of my writing, but you guys always help me persevere through writers block and reassure me (whether intentionally or not). And for that I am forever grateful. Thank you for letting me apart of this community <3.

I just checked my requests after a long while and.... holy shit you guys. There is so much😭(in a good way tho dw!!). Theres so many amazing ideas in here. Lik
creator: Alladeeznuts
